name: validation_scenarios
description: Minimal scenario format for planning single-point behavior validation. These scenarios define what telemetry would be expected; they do not run samples.

scenario_fields.name: Human-readable scenario name.
scenario_fields.purpose: Short explanation of what the scenario validates.
scenario_fields.sample_type: Suggested safe sample or fixture type.
scenario_fields.required_telemetry: Telemetry event groups needed for this scenario.
scenario_fields.expected_dynamic_events: Expected event type strings when the behavior is observed.
scenario_fields.success_criteria: Checks used to decide whether telemetry supports the behavior.
scenario_fields.safety_notes: Safety constraints and human review notes.

scenarios.name: Controlled command-line launch
scenarios.purpose: Validate that command execution telemetry can be collected and mapped.
success_criteria: A process_create event records a command interpreter or script host.
The event includes process_name or command_line evidence.
safety_notes: Use simulated telemetry until an isolated VM collection path is approved.
